headline: How To Watch And Stream Elon Musk On 'SNL'
summary: One of the most anticipated television events of the year is happening late Saturday with Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) CEO Elon Musk appearing as the host of comedy show "Saturday Night Live."

headline: 5 Things You Might Not Know About Miley Cyrus
summary: Miley Cyrus will be the musical guest on the highly anticipated "Saturday Night Live" episode tonight featuring Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) CEO Elon Musk as host.

headline: Tesla Cybertruck Makes Appearance In New York Ahead Of Musk's Hosting Of 'SNL'
summary: Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) appears to not be missing out on a promotional opportunity for one of the highly anticipated products in its pipeline.

headline: SpaceX Rival To Run Pre-Roll Ads With Elon Musk's 'SNL' YouTube Segments
summary: When Elon Musk's "Saturday Night Live" appearance is over, the individual segments from the show will be posted on Alphabet's (NASDAQ: GOOGL) (NASDAQ: GOOG) YouTube platform on May 9.

headline: The Past Week's Notable Insider Buys: Amphenol, Aldeyra, Werewolf Therapeutics And More
summary:
Insider buying can be an encouraging signal for potential investors, especially when markets are near all-time highs.
	Once again, some insiders have taken advantage of initial public offerings.
	A couple of chief executive officers were among the insiders buying shares this past week.

headline: Benzinga's Bulls And Bears Of The Week: Apple, Amazon, Kroger, Netflix, Pfizer And More
summary:
Benzinga has examined the prospects for many of investors' favorite stocks over the past week. 
	The past week's bullish calls included a couple of FAANG stocks and a company that just took a big hit.

headline: If Sports Content Is King, Sinclair's DTC Model Could Be A Home Run
summary: Sinclair Broadcast Group Inc (NASDAQ: SBGI) acquired the regional sports channels from the Walt Disney Co (NYSE: DIS) in 2019.
